subject: test sample
text:
Hello Support Team,

I am experiencing an issue with the application performance. The dashboard is loading very slowly and sometimes times out completely. This started happening after the latest update.

Could you please investigate this performance degradation? I've noticed it's particularly slow when generating reports.

Thank you for your help,
John
html:
Hello Support Team,

I am experiencing an issue with the application performance. The dashboard is loading very slowly and sometimes times out completely. This started happening after the latest update.

Could you please investigate this performance degradation? I've noticed it's particularly slow when generating reports.

Thank you for your help,
John
